title: Mount $HOME:$HOME by default in podman machine init
body:
By default, mount the user's homedir into the vm at the same location.
any volumes defined on the cli will then override the default mount.
Also, added --no-volumes to disable volume mounts alltogether.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: do not merge this .... @rhatdan is going to make a field for container's conf and we will read the default volume mounts from there.  I will rework this PR then.
